issues.issue: Assume statements are allowed only in component types

Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types
left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type

left side of binary expression '<' is of type '<error>' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
